input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.1.2.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.1.2.2
            TITLE: decisions of the chief technical inspector(s) and the organizer concerning vehicle compliance

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.1.2.2: Decisions of the Chief Technical Inspector(s) and the Organizer concerning vehicle compliance
IN.1.2.2 Decisions of the Chief Technical Inspector(s) and the Organizer concerning vehicle compliance 
are final.

final_answer: Decisions of the Chief Technical Inspector(s) and the Organizer concerning vehicle compliance are final.
